---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a change to AILang
title: "[Feature] "
labels: feature
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

One-paragraph description of the proposed change.

## Category

- [ ] Language feature (new syntax, keyword, grammar, semantics)
- [ ] Stdlib addition (new function or module)
- [ ] Tooling (CLI, formatter, LSP, editor support)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Performance
- [ ] Other

## Motivation

Which applications or use cases need this feature? Why are existing
features insufficient?

## Evidence

If this is a **language feature** or **stdlib addition**, list at least
3 (language) or 2 (stdlib) independent AILang application source files
that require this feature. Include file paths or code snippets.

## Specification

If applicable, describe the proposed syntax, semantics, and behaviour.

## Backward Compatibility

Would this change break existing programs? If yes, describe the migration path.

## Implementation Sketch

High-level approach to implementing this feature (optional but helpful).
